result.stderr:
Aspose.BarCode Recognize Barcode Micro Application 25.6.0.0
Copyright © 2010-2025 Aspose Pty. Ltd

  -i, --input            Required. Input images paths or url. Supported formats
                         are: JPEG, TIFF, PNG, BMP, GIF

  -t, --type             Barcode symbology. Supported values are: AustraliaPost,
                         Aztec, GS1Aztec, ISBN, Codabar, Code11, Code128,
                         GS1Code128, Code39Extended, Code39Standard,
                         Code93Extended, Code93Standard, DataMatrix,
                         DeutschePostIdentcode, DeutschePostLeitcode, EAN13,
                         EAN14, EAN8, IATA2of5, Interleaved2of5, ISSN, ISMN,
                         ItalianPost25, ITF14, ITF6, MacroPdf417, Matrix2of5,
                         MSI, OneCode, OPC, PatchCode, Pdf417, MicroPdf417,
                         Planet, Postnet, PZN, QR, MicroQR, RM4SCC, Mailmark,
                         SCC14, SSCC18, Standard2of5, Supplement, UPCA, UPCE,
                         VIN, Pharmacode, GS1DataMatrix, DatabarOmniDirectional,
                         DatabarTruncated, DatabarLimited, DatabarExpanded,
                         SwissPostParcel, AustralianPosteParcel, Code16K,
                         DatabarStackedOmniDirectional, DatabarStacked,
                         DatabarExpandedStacked, CompactPdf417, GS1QR, MaxiCode,
                         MicrE13B, Code32, DataLogic2of5, DotCode, DutchKIX,
                         CodablockF, HIBCCode39LIC, HIBCCode128LIC,
                         HIBCAztecLIC, HIBCDataMatrixLIC, HIBCQRLIC,
                         HIBCCode39PAS, HIBCCode128PAS, HIBCAztecPAS,
                         HIBCDataMatrixPAS, HIBCQRPAS, GS1DotCode, HanXin,
                         GS1HanXin, GS1CompositeBar, GS1MicroPdf417,
                         RectMicroQR.

  -o, --output           Path to output file. If not specified than output would
                         be written to the standard output stream.

  -f, --output_format    Output format. Supported formats are: text, csv, xml,
                         json.

  -q, --quality          Recognition quality. Supported values are: fast,
                         normal, high.

  -l, --license          Path to Aspose.BarCode .NET license file.

  -v, --verbose          (Default: false) Verbose output.

  --help                 Display this help screen.

  --version              Display version information.

staticCommands.name: add
staticCommands.description: Add reference to the MicroApps API to your project.

options.description: Path to the project project for the addition of the reference to the MicroApps API.
Input images paths or url. Supported formats are: JPEG, TIFF, PNG, BMP, GIF
Path to output file. If not specified than output would be written to the standard output stream.
Output format. Supported formats are: text, csv, xml, json.
Recognition quality. Supported values are: fast, normal, high.

Barcode symbology. Supported values are: AustraliaPost, Aztec, GS1Aztec, ISBN, Codabar, Code11, Code128, GS1Code128, Code39Extended, Code39Standard, Code93Extended, Code93Standard, DataMatrix, DeutschePostIdentcode, DeutschePostLeitcode, EAN13, EAN14, EAN8, IATA2of5, Interleaved2of5, ISSN, ISMN, ItalianPost25, ITF14, ITF6, MacroPdf417, Matrix2of5, MSI, OneCode, OPC, PatchCode, Pdf417, MicroPdf417, Planet, Postnet, PZN, QR, MicroQR, RM4SCC, Mailmark, SCC14, SSCC18, Standard2of5, Supplement, UPCA, UPCE, VIN, Pharmacode, GS1DataMatrix, DatabarOmniDirectional, DatabarTruncated, DatabarLimited, DatabarExpanded, SwissPostParcel, AustralianPosteParcel, Code16K, DatabarStackedOmniDirectional, DatabarStacked, DatabarExpandedStacked, CompactPdf417, GS1QR, MaxiCode, MicrE13B, Code32, DataLogic2of5, DotCode, DutchKIX, CodablockF, HIBCCode39LIC, HIBCCode128LIC, HIBCAztecLIC, HIBCDataMatrixLIC, HIBCQRLIC, HIBCCode39PAS, HIBCCode128PAS, HIBCAztecPAS, HIBCDataMatrixPAS, HIBCQRPAS, GS1DotCode, HanXin, GS1HanXin, GS1CompositeBar, GS1MicroPdf417, RectMicroQR.
